article_meta.title: Tillis: 'Noem Is Out of Her Depth,' She's 'Not Competent' 7 Pam Key28 Jan 2026 Wednesday on CNN's "The Lead," Sen

reasoning: Wrong-direction classification with overconfidence on an article whose authorial prose is largely neutral/structural. The assistant leans Left based on quoted criticism and speculative narrative alignment, cites headline quote language (attribution lapse), and wraps output in code fences (format violation).

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Article’s authorial prose is neutral and quote-transcriptive; if anything, selection/platforming of a GOP senator on a right-leaning site suggests Center to Lean Right. Labeling it Left is the wrong direction.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: Signals are subtle/mixed; a clear-lean confidence of 0.85 is unjustified.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Some structural evidence is valid (one-sided selection), but the reasoning leans on headline quoted phrases and broad speculation about narratives, constituting an attribution lapse and vagueness.
